stem: The equation 64 = 2L + 2W gives the perimeter of a rectangular garden bed that has length L, in feet, and width W, in feet. The width of the garden bed is 11 feet. What is the length, in feet, of the garden bed?
rationale: Substituting W = 11 into 64 = 2L + 2W gives 64 = 2L + 22. Subtracting 22 from each side yields 42 = 2L, so L = 21.
